---
title: "Mvuselelo Mathunjwa"
toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
  image: lelo.jpeg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/samanthacsik/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/samanthacsik
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:mathun1@stolaf.edu
---

Welcome to my site. HEHEHEHE. Now you're trapped forever. You are in my dominion now, and will have to live by my word.
